L1.head: conformational dynamics of GPCRs
L1.claim: 构象动力学通过分子动力学模拟和结构分析生成数据集

L1.head: rich dataset
L1.claim: 数据集揭示膜脂质动力学对GPCR功能多样性的影响

L1.head: impact of membrane lipid dynamics
L1.claim: 膜脂质影响机制促进发现新变构位点

L1.head: identification of novel allosteric sites
L1.claim: 新位点发现为开发靶向药物提供可能

L2.head: integration of cryo-EM/X-ray data with MD simulations
L2.claim: 多源数据整合建立构象-药物结合模型

L2.head: comprehensive model
L2.tail: conformational states' influence on drug binding
L2.claim: 模型解析构象变化对药物亲和力的作用机制

L2.head: conformational states' influence on drug binding
L2.claim: 动态相互作用预测药物治疗效果

L2.head: GPCR flexibility from MD simulations
L2.claim: 受体柔性驱动侧向特异性结合位点形成

L2.head: formation of side-specific binding sites
L2.claim: 膜脂成分调控侧向位点表达

L2.head: membrane lipids
L2.claim: 脂质调控机制指导变构药物设计

L3.head: synergistic approach of cryo-EM/X-ray/MD
L3.claim: 多技术联用验证动态变构位点存在

L3.head: hidden allosteric sites
L3.claim: 需定点诱变等实验确认位点功能

L3.head: membrane lipid dynamics (cholesterol)
L3.claim: 特定脂质调控变构位点空间构型

L3.head: GPCR-lipid interactions
L3.claim: 脂质互作机制指导高选择性药物开发

L3.head: lipid-exploiting drugs
L3.claim: 体外脂质调控实验验证药物有效性
